# Tax Toolkit UK
> Free UK tax calculators for 2025/26. All figures use current HMRC rates.
> Independently operated. Not financial advice.

## About
Tax Toolkit UK provides 14 free tax calculators across 4 categories covering income tax, self assessment, business tax, salary sacrifice, and property. Every calculator uses 2025/26 HMRC rates and is self-contained — no login, no data collection, no paywalls.

## Tool Index

### Income Tax & Self Assessment
- Self Assessment Tax Calculator 2025/26: /self-assessment-calculator.html
- Dividend Tax Calculator 2025/26: /dividend-tax-calculator.html
- Capital Gains Tax Calculator 2025/26: /cgt-calculator.html
- Marriage Allowance Calculator: /marriage-allowance-calculator.html
- Tax Code Checker UK 2025/26: /tax-code-checker.html

### Business & Freelance
- IR35 Checker: /ir35-checker.html
- Salary vs Dividends Calculator 2025/26: /salary-vs-dividends-calculator.html
- VAT Threshold Calculator: /vat-threshold-calculator.html
- Employer Cost Calculator UK 2025/26: /employer-cost-calculator.html

### Salary Sacrifice & Benefits
- Salary Sacrifice Calculator 2025/26: /salary-sacrifice-calculator.html
- Student Loan Repayment Calculator: /student-loan-calculator.html
- Pension Tax Relief Calculator: /pension-calculator.html

### Property & Capital
- Inheritance Tax Calculator UK: /inheritance-tax-calculator.html
- Rental Income Tax Calculator: /rental-income-tax-calculator.html

## Supporting Pages
- Homepage (all tools): /index.html
- About: /about.html
- Privacy Policy: /privacy.html
- Contact: /contact.html

## Rate Update Policy
All tax rates updated each April following the new UK tax year.
